perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair wearing a cream-colored sweatshirt stands indoors in front of large windows, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. (2) He gestures slightly with his hands and moves to his right, revealing a woman with short hair and a black jacket sitting on a bench behind him; she maintains a somber, downcast expression. (3) Both the man and the woman stand together and perform a synchronized, deep bow towards the camera, holding the position for several seconds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in a calm, steady, and serious tone in Mandarin. (2) No background music is present; only very faint ambient indoor air noise is audible. (3) The male voice says 'Thank you everyone' (謝謝大家) in a polite manner before the sound cuts out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '為了節省大家的時間' (Serious/Functional). (2) '有關今天凌晨+O發表的聲明影片' (Serious/Functional). (3) '幫大家統整的' (Informative/Functional). (4) '+O聲明影片 重點懶人包如下' (Hook/Functional). (5) '謝謝大家' (Polite/Functional).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Address to camera -> Reveal second person -> Final bow

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male speaking to camera, 1 female sitting in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male: Mid-30s, short brown hair, wearing a cream-colored sweatshirt with exposed seams. Female: Mid-30s, short dark hair with bangs, wearing a black jacket over a ruffled collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a town with mountains in the far distance; a long wooden table or bench is visible along the window.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a concise summary of a statement video released by another party and to conclude with a formal, somber expression of gratitude or apology to the audience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's formal addressing style followed by a traditional deep bow.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video carries a heavy, serious tone typical of public responses to controversies or significant news within the influencer community.
